description: At end of life, trained personnel dismantle the steel pedestals to ensure maximum recyclability. 95% of the steel pedestal is recycled — the steel reaches end-of-waste status and substitutes primary steel production. The remaining 5% of non-recyclable material is directed to landfill. Adhesive and plastic gaskets are incinerated in Module C3. Per declared unit (1.47 kg/m²): 1.23 kg recycled, 0.065 kg landfilled. EPD: Steel pedestals for system floors, Issue 17.02.2026, Valid to 16.02.2031.
